  as={"h1"}

  children={"List queued messages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/outbox"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists messages in the Outbox

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"page","in":"query","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Page number (zero indexed, so use 0 for first page)","example":0,"default":0,"minimum":0,"maximum":1048576},"description":"Page number (zero indexed, so use 0 for first page)"},{"name":"pageSize","in":"query","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"How many entries per page","example":20,"default":20,"minimum":1,"maximum":1000},"description":"How many entries per page"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"total":{"type":"integer","description":"How many matching entries","example":120},"page":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page (0-based index)","example":0},"pages":{"type":"integer","description":"Total page count","example":24},"messages":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"queueId":{"type":"string","description":"Unique queue entry identifier","example":"1869c5692565f756b33"},"account":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier for the email account","example":"user123","maxLength":256,"x-convert":{"trim":true}},"source":{"type":"string","description":"How this message entered the queue","example":"smtp","enum":["smtp","api"],"title":"OutboxSource"},"messageId":{"type":"string","description":"Message-ID header value","example":"<test123@example.com>","maxLength":996},"envelope":{"type":"object","description":"SMTP envelope information","properties":{"from":{"type":"string","example":"sender@example.com","x-format":{"email":true}},"to":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","example":"recipient@example.com","x-format":{"email":true}},"title":"OutboxEnvelopeTo"}},"title":"OutboxEnvelope"},"subject":{"type":"string","description":"Email subject line","example":"What a wonderful message","maxLength":10240},"created":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"When this message was added to the queue","example":"2021-02-17T13:43:18.860Z"},"scheduled":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Scheduled delivery time","example":"2021-02-17T13:43:18.860Z"},"nextAttempt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Next delivery attempt time","example":"2021-02-17T13:43:18.860Z"},"attemptsMade":{"type":"integer","description":"Number of delivery attempts made","example":3},"attempts":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum delivery attempts before marking as failed","example":3},"progress":{"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","description":"Current delivery status","example":"queued","enum":["queued","processing","submitted","error"],"title":"OutboxStatus"},"response":{"type":"string","description":"SMTP server response (when status is \"processing\")","example":"250 Message Accepted"},"error":{"type":"object","description":"Error details (when status is \"error\")","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"Error description","example":"Authentication failed"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Error code","example":"EAUTH"},"statusCode":{"type":"string","description":"SMTP response code","example":502}},"title":"OutboxListProgressError"}},"title":"OutboxEntryProgress"}},"required":["account"],"title":"OutboxEntry"},"title":"OutboxListEntries"}},"title":"OutboxListResponse"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
